title: Roo Code
copyText:
## Editorial notes

Roo Code is a good fit when users want mode-specific agent behavior for planning, code edits, debugging, and routine project work.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
detailMarkdown:
# Roo Code

Open-source AI coding agent for VS Code with modes for planning, editing, debugging, and workflow automation.
